info.title: Authorization - temu.local.mall.tags.get
info.description: This API allows sellers to retrieve the list of store tags currently assigned to their store.

post.summary: This API allows sellers to retrieve the list of store tags currently assigned to their store.
post.description: This API allows sellers to retrieve the list of store tags currently assigned to their store.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Temu router request body. The `type` field must be `temu.local.mall.tags.get`.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: access_token
x-temu-common-parameters.description: A secure token for access control.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: timestamp
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: data_type
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: version
x-temu-common-parameters.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

x-temu-additional-tables.label: The following are the interfaces involved in product release

rows.Interface Overview: Get the complete category of temu
Obtain attribute/variant data corresponding to temu category
Used to generate custom variant specification IDs
Whether to fill in the size chart and requirements for obtaining categories
Upload product videos, files, and images
Verify whether the product attributes comply with the site's sales rules
Verify if the external product code and SKU code are duplicated
Get the seller's set product shipping template
Obtain the brand information registered by the seller
Obtain SKU net content unit information
Verify whether there are any violations in the product name, product description, and other information
Used to query product compliance and governance attribute requirements
Used to obtain product compliance information and fill in

rows.Precautions: Validation Rules:Only supports English letters, numbers, and symbols.Does not support decorative characters: ~ ! * $ ? _ ~ { } # < > \

rows.How to fill in: Retrieve from bg.local.goods.cats.get; bg.local.goods.category.recommend can quickly match Temu categories from product information.
rows.Precautions: bg.local.goods.cats.getEntering `parentCatId`=0 retrieves all available first-level categories for posting.To obtain leaf categories: Recursively call this interface, entering `parentCatId` with the `catId` selected from the previous call's results to get the next level of category ID until the leaf categories are reached.When entering a leaf category, the interface returns empty.ImportantEnsure to use the most specific (leaf) category ID for posting products; you must keep calling the aforementioned interface until the most specific category is obtained.`catType` is an important varibale for judgement whether category is an Apparel (`catType=0`) or Non-Apparel(`catType=1`) one, it will effect at the image required shape.Some categories on different sites are not sellable, only the categories with availableStatus=0 need to be obtained

- Max number of video URIs: 1Duration: ≤180sAspect Ratio: 1:1, 4:3, 16:9Resolution: ≥720PSize: ≤300 MBFormat: wmv, avi, 3gp, mov, mp4, flv, rmvb, mkv, m4v, x-flv, WMV, AVI, 3GP, MOV, MP4, FLV, RMVB, MKV, M4V, X-FLV-Uploading requires an additional call to the video upload interface.Please refer to this document for details

- Max number of image URIs: 49Aspect Ratio: ≥1:3Width: ≥480pxHeight: ≥480pxSize: ≤3 MBFormat: JPEG, JPG, PNG-Image upload requires an additional call to bg.local.goods.image.upload for conversion. Please refer to this document for details

This is used to associate the SKU between TEMU and the external ecommerce platform. Must be unique within the store.Max length: 100 characters. Please do not use leading or trailing spaces in SKUs.bg.local.goods.out.sn.checkThis interface can be used to verify whether the seller's products have duplicate goods codes
Indicates the time, in days, between when you receive an order for an item and when you can ship the item. The default production time is **1 or 2.**
Delivery Method: 1 - Self-fulfillment, Fixed setting to **1**
Users need to go to the seller center to create the shipping template page in order for this interface to return the corresponding data

This is a very important and complex piece of information, and it takes more time to process it when entering it-Determine whether the field **isSale=false** is a normal attribute or**isSale=true** is a variant attribute, This array is used to set product data about **isSale=false**-Pay attention to the contentRequired attributes must be passed in, judging by **bg.local.goods.template.get** **- required=True**There is a parent-child relationship attribute. When the parent attribute selects a value, the child attribute must be passed in`showType = 0`: Parent attribute.`showType = 1`: Child attribute.Child attributes appear based on the `controlType` of the parent attribute. If `controlType = 0`, `showCondition` will indicate the conditions under which child attributes are triggered based on parent attribute values.If `controlType` is `1`, `3`, or `16`, the `templatePropertyValueParentList` will determine when child attributes are triggered.Attributes that have units should include both `valueUnitId` and `valueUnit` when available in the `valueUnitList`. These are typically used in combination with `controlType = 0`.bg.local.goods.compliance.property.checkPlease note that it is recommended to use this interface to check for any violations in product information to avoid affecting salesPlease refer to this document for details

This field is not mandatory for product publishing, but if this information is missing, it will not be able to be sold. It is recommended to provide a feature for users to set it together when publishing products
Origin enumeration information, please refer to this document
When originRegion1 selects China, this information needs to be enteredplease refer to this document

A flag for identifying the method of value retrieval:- True: This modification will be automatically retrieved and entered by Temu based on the preoduct and the seller's certified information by default.- False: This modification will read and input the value passed through the API.Default: FalseDefault rules:1. Priority is given to obtaining the address information of the product manufacturer.2. If the manufacturer's address is unavailable, the business address will be obtained.
Size:≤ 3 MBFormat: JPG, PNG, JPEG-Image upload requires an additional call to bg.local.goods.image.upload for conversion. Please refer to this document for details

Highlight the main characteristics and advantages of the product.Validation Rules:Only supports English letters, numbers, and symbols.Data type: string.Character count: Within 700 characters.Up to 6 lines maximum (6 objects).temu.local.goods.illegal.vocabulary.checkPlease note that it is recommended to use this interface to check for any violations in product information to avoid affecting sales

Detailed explanation of the product's features and uses.Validation Rules:Only supports letters, numbers, and symbols; does not support rich text.Data type: string.Character count: Within 10000 characters.temu.local.goods.illegal.vocabulary.checkPlease note that it is recommended to use this interface to check for any violations in product information to avoid affecting sales

rows.Precautions: -When publishing a product, it is not mandatory. Merchants need to supplement it completely before selling, otherwise the sale will be restricted-get from **bg.local.goods.compliance.extra.template.get**~**templateDimensionType**templateDimensionType=1 (goods) or 2 (goods and sku) this value needs to be passed inAccording to this interface, obtain the qualification rules that need to be uploaded **[isRequired=true]**. When calling this interface, you need to pass in the product category and attributes. Different attribute information for the same category will affect the qualification requirements-The entry rules here are similar to the general attributes of the product, and it is important to pay attention to the type of **ControlType & parentVidList** , which can affect different entry methods. **Please refer to the document for details**-contentType=1 represents the qualification certificate（use **certFiles** to upload）contentType=2 the inspection report（use **inspectReportFiles** to upload）contentType=3 the qualification code（use **authCodes** to upload）contentType=4 actualPhoto（use **actualPhoto** to upload）contentType=5 selectedCheckItems （use **selectedCheckItems** to upload）contentType=6 EU-energyLabel （use **energyLabel** to upload）**demo**"extraTemplate":{"extraTemplateDetailList": [{"templateId": 51,"inputText": {"**refPid**": {"multiLineInputs": [{"name": "2222"},{"name": "111"}]}}}

According to the bg.local.goods.compliance.extra.template.get, determine whether it is necessary to upload the instruction manual. It is not mandatory when publishing products, but some categories will be restricted from sale if they are not supplemented before sale. It is recommended to add a feature for users to set when publishing productsLanguage-PDF Product Manual Mapping: key is the language, value is the file URL.The English version must be importedUploading requires an additional call to the file upload interface.Correct parameter example：CopySwitch color`"lang2GuideFileUrl": { "en": "", "es": "", "de": "" }`Please refer to this document for details

For some categories, corresponding size chart information needs to be set. Currently, it is not mandatory when products are released, but if it is not supplemented before sale, sales will be restricted. Please refer to the document for detailsIs it necessary to set a size chart for the category obtained through bg.local.goods.size.element.get

Is it necessary to set a size chart for the category obtained through bg.local.goods.size.element.getIt is recommended that the image include the following information: all selected size, product parameters, use size units in.Convert images from bg.local.goods.image.upload to Temu-Quantity: 1 pieces-Format: jpeg, jpg, png-Aspect Ratio(with:height): ≥1:3-Width: ≥800px-High: ≥800px-Size:≤ 3 MB**It is recommended to use this method for size information processing, which will help users easily publish products**

rows.How to fill in: User inputs & Retrieve from other APIs
rows.Precautions: This amount information is the amount that the merchant plans to sell in TEMU. If there are subsequent orders generated, this amount information will be used to calculate the settlement amount with the merchant
Different sites have corresponding requirements for currency information, please refer to this document for details
Recommended retail price (must be ≥ basePrice)

- If the parameter is set to 1, it is understood that the seller does not have a market price, and there is no need to provide a value for listPrice (even if a value is provided, it will be ignored).- If the parameter is left empty or set to 0, the listPrice field is required. Failure to provide listPrice will result in an error.
This is the inventory information corresponding to the product, with a setting range of **[0, 999999]**

rows.How to fill in: User inputs & Retrieve from other APIs
rows.Precautions: This is a field used to distinguish variants, such as color, size, etc. Please note that there are two ways to set this information for different categories on the platform. Setting this information is often prone to errors and requires special attentionEach category has a set of attribute templates, which can be retrieved via the `**bg.local.goods.template.get**` interface.Sales attributes are further classified based on whether customization is allowed:If the category allows user-defined attributes, `inputMaxSpecNum > 0` is returned.If the category only allows selecting predefined attributes, `inputMaxSpecNum = 0` is returned. In this case, you should only select attributes marked with `required = true` in the `goodsSpecProperties` object, and pick a few values.Custom attributes are allowed only when `inputMaxSpecNum > 0`.In this case, you can choose a `parentSpec` from `userInputParentSpecList`, and use `bg.local.goods.spec.id.get` to generate specification values. These values will form variants, such as creating a custom specification value like `color1` under the `color` attribute.**Note:** It’s possible for `inputMaxSpecNum > 0` and `goodsSpecProperties != []` to occur at the same time, which means the category allows both custom attributes and predefined attribute values. For example, a predefined `color` attribute might have options like `['red', 'blue']`, and a custom attribute like `type` can also be added. You can combine these to create variants by selecting values from both `color` and `type`.**Note:** `singleSpecValueNum` defines the maximum number of variants that can be created.`**bg.local.goods.spec.id.get**` generates specification values, which should be passed as input parameters in the `skuList[*].specIdList` field of the `goods.add` method.please refer to this document for details

If a merchant operates on multiple platforms, they usually use this field to identify products associated with other platforms. This field is very important for sellers and will affect the subsequent inventory and order product information associationCharacters: English letters/numbers/symbolsNumber of characters: ≤100Must not be the same as any other SKU/SPU ID in the same store.bg.local.goods.sku.out.sn.checkThis interface can be used to verify whether the seller's products have duplicate goods codes

Identify whether it belongs to the clothing category through the bg.local.goods.cats.get-catType, as different types have differences in size ratios**Apparel Carousel Images**Aspect Ratio: 3:4Width:≥1340pxHeight: ≥1785px**Non-Apparel Carousel Images**Aspect Ratio: 1:1Width:≥800pxHeight: ≥800px-Size：≤3 MB-Format: jpeg, jpg, pngIt is necessary to upload the images to TEMU in advance, and using bg.local.goods.image.upload will facilitate users to handle the corresponding image proportions and sizes in a portable manner
External Product Type, 1=EAN 2=UPC 3=ISBN 4=GTIN-14

When setting externalProductType, this field is mandatory and the platform will verify the authenticity of the entered externalProductId. Different categories have mandatory requirements-bg.local.goods.template.get: Added parameters [additionalInfo] and [needIsbn] to determine if a mandatory ISBN code is required
Provide links to products sold on other platforms. It is recommended to provide this feature for merchants to set up, which will help with their sales process

rows.How to fill in: User inputs & Retrieve from other APIs

rows.Precautions: Regular SKU Type: 1-Single Product, 2-Combination, 3-Mixed
-When skuClassification is set to 1, this field defaults to 1, while other types are set by the merchantThe value of the "Count" field should be between **[1,100]**
Unit Specification ID: 1-Piece, 2-Pair, 3-Bag

For products consumed by volume, weight, length and area, this field is used to describe the quantity of the corresponding physical units in the SKU to calculate the unit price, such as $5.94/kg.Unit count can contain 3 decimal places, and any decimal places exceeding 3 will be rounded off.For skuClassification=2, Only then will this field be displayed for users to set

The unit corresponding to Unit count. This can be weight, volume, length or area.For skuClassification=2, Only then will this field be displayed for users to setSpecific values need to be obtained through additional request interfacestemu.local.goods.sku.net.content.unit.query
-Whether Is Individual Packed: true is 1 and false is 0.-Only skuClassification=2 or 3 needs to be set

-Use temu.local.goods.brand.trademark.V2.get to get **brandId** and **trademarkId**.-Please note that the brand information of each seller is different, and it needs to be reviewed and approved in advance in the seller center before the product can be published for use
The specific information is returned through the interface, and it should be noted that this data is different for each merchant. It is necessary to apply in advance to the seller center
bg.local.goods.tax.code.getDifferent categories have corresponding tax rate codes. It is recommended to obtain them by referencing the corresponding category at the time of shipment
Please refer to this document for details

If a merchant needs to sell second-hand goods, they need to contact Temu's internal operations in advance to open it. Only stores that have applied for approval can publish second-hand goods. The merchant can determine whether they meet the conditions for publishing second-hand goods based on BG. If they meet the requirements, bg.local.goods.cats.get-secondHandCategory=true will return the corresponding results
If selling second-hand goods, fill in **true** by default
1-usedLikeNew, 2-usedVeryGood, 3-usedGood, 4-UsedAcceptable.Please refer to this document for details

type.description: API name,eg:bg.* Must be `temu.local.mall.tags.get` for this operation.

access_token.description: A secure token for access control.

timestamp.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

data_type.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

version.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.
